description: Nigerian polling units (~176,846 registered for 2023). EMPTY — INEC domains unreachable during collection.

gaps.what: Full polling unit list: PU code, ward, LGA, state, registered voters, coordinates
gaps.why_failed: All INEC domains returned TLS/connection errors. IReV portal also unreachable.
gaps.unblock: Operator should download INEC PU register from inecnigeria.org (published as Excel/PDF). As of 2023, the total registered voters were approximately 93.4 million across 176,846 PUs.
